# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { EdgeFunction } from '@vercel/edge-functions';

const apiFunction: EdgeFunction = async ({ request }) => {
  // Bring in default values
  let apiKey = 'vercel_default_key_789';
  let dbUrl = 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';
  let featureFlag = false;
  
  // Update them with the edge config if available
  if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
    const edgeConfig = JSON.parse(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG);
  
    if (edgeConfig.apiKey) {
      apiKey = edgeConfig.apiKey;
    }
  
    if (edgeConfig.dbUrl) {
      dbUrl = edgeConfig.dbUrl;
    }
  
    if (edgeConfig.featureFlag) {
      featureFlag = edgeConfig.featureFlag;
    }
  }

  // Now use these apiKey, dbUrl, and featureFlag in your function...

  // For now, just return them to check:
  return new Response(JSON.stringify({
    apiKey,
    dbUrl,
    featureFlag
  }));
};

export default apiFunction;
